commands.review_summary:
This PR adds `argsMenu: "auto"` to the built-in `/verbose` command in `src/auto-reply/commands-registry.shared.ts`.

Reproducibility: yes. from source: current main gives `/verbose` choices but no `argsMenu`, and the registry test asserts `resolveCommandArgMenu` returns null for no-arg `/verbose`. I did not run a live Telegram or Feishu reproduction in this read-only review.
commands.review_followup: Needs contributor real-behavior proof and maintainer UX direction on no-arg `/verbose`; this is not a safe automated repair while proof is absent.

target.title: fix(commands): add argsMenu to /verbose for inline button rendering
target.body:
## Summary

The `/verbose` command was missing `argsMenu: "auto"`, so its option choices (on/off/full) were not rendered as inline buttons on Telegram and Feishu. Users had to manually type the option instead of tapping a button.

Note: `/reasoning` already has `argsMenu: "auto"` in current main, so only `/verbose` needed the fix.

## Before

```
Current verbose level: off
Options: on, off, full
```

User must type the option manually.

## After

Inline buttons are rendered for on/off/full choices, matching the behavior of `/think`, `/trace`, `/fast`, etc.

## Testing

- Verified other commands with `argsMenu: "auto"` (think, trace, fast, reasoning) already render buttons correctly
- The fix is a single-line addition matching the established pattern

Fixes #85088
